name: logistics coordinators managing 10–20 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 shipments/week, inefficient carrier assignments cause increased shipping costs. We recommend carrier assignments based on data analysis instead of manual carrier selection based on past experiences.
problem_solved: Inefficient carrier assignments leading to increased shipping costs and delayed deliveries.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient carrier assignments leading to increased shipping costs and delayed deliveries.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 shipments/week, inefficient carrier assignments cause increased shipping costs. We recommend carrier assignments based on data analysis instead of manual carrier selection based on past experiences.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual carrier selection based on past experiences

one_liner: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 shipments/week, inefficient carrier assignments cause increased shipping costs. We recommend carrier assignments based on data analysis instead of manual carrier selection based on past experiences.
